title: EQ - Custom EQ, change values on the sliders
scenario: Custom EQ sliders can have their values changed successfully in the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: Tap on the connected device name to open Device Settings
Adjust each frequency slider (e.g., 32Hz, 64Hz, 125Hz, 250Hz, 500Hz, 1kHz, 2kHz, 4kHz, 8kHz, 16kHz) one by one by dragging them up and down
Verify that each slider responds to touch and the value changes accordingly
expected: All sliders in the Custom EQ screen can be adjusted successfully, and the value changes are reflected in real-time.
